---
title: "Crunchbase"
page-layout: article
---

# Crunchbase

## Description

Database of private and public companies, investors, funding rounds, acquisitions, and startup activity. Supports research on entrepreneurship, innovation ecosystems, and venture capital.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Technology & Innovation
- **Data/resource type:** Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Data Platform
- **Access model:** Request Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Data Platform

## Access notes

Data is available by request. Use the access link in the Quicksearch record to get started.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://search.library.yale.edu/catalog/99159676243408651)
- [Request access](https://forms.office.com/pages/responsepage.aspx?id=u76M3Tkh-E20EU4-h6vrXGa2PpecL_VHoOa9Jy4XGNVUQTVRTE40N1kwVk5FTzJTNjJOVzRPWU5IUCQlQCN0PWcu&route=shorturl)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
